title: Sealed Packet V — Packet fifth under wafer
subtitle: Filed in a fair hand; trust it not overmuch.

sections.heading: INNER ABSTRACT
sections.body:
The alignment of the restricted sheets isolates the true nature of the daytime discrepancies. The picture dealer’s revised timeline was a shield against an entirely separate illegality—the illicit tracking of uncatalogued canvases. By untangling this lesser deception, the noisy disputes of the afternoon dissolve, exposing the absolute quiet of the evening ledger. One falsehood thus sheltered the true presence, and the desk was briefly blinded by a minor sin.

Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound. It was observed at the desk that fear and deceit oft borrow one another's garments. Methinks the paper smelleth of haste, candle grease, and a conscience unquiet. The desk-note beneath it read only: "keep apart from the louder papers."

sections.heading: RESTRICTED OBSERVATION
sections.body:
A private note, withheld from the public folio, placed the matter of lead-white poisoning and the hour of evening—seven o'clock—in one narrow channel. There were signs of tampering in the earlier reports; the door-book had been re-sequenced, the decanter prints had been logged twice under different numbers. Yet one tampered paper nonetheless preserved a genuine splinter of truth, tucked among its artifices like a pin in velvet. Thus even the untrustworthy document must be read, and read again. On the reverse, in a hand almost playful, some soul had jotted: sixth bell, seventh stair, fifth lantern, eighth berth.

Trust this sheet if thou wilt; the sergeant trusted it not, yet kept it. One of the detained souls lies outright, another lies by omission, and a third speaketh true in so crooked a manner that truth itself seems perjured. A prudent reader will note what is said, and more keenly what is artfully left unsaid. The desk-note beneath it read only: "keep apart from the louder papers."

sections.heading: CLOSER NOTE
sections.body:
The register retrieved from the iron cabinet provides the missing ledger vector. The terminal entries indicate an impending total disclosure to the prosecutor, scheduled for the upcoming Monday. The administrative delays and the wandering state of the open files point to an internal intervention—someone with direct authority to re-stamp exhibits and review the bundles prior to archiving, ensuring that systemic exposure was completely averted.

Set down under oath, and therefore no safer than any other vanity of men. The constables disputed the matter till dawn: whether the witness erred, dissembled, or sought by falsehood to shield a greater villainy. The margin is cleaner than the tale; that alone should give a sober mind pause. The desk-note beneath it read only: "keep apart from the louder papers."

sections.heading: TERMINAL FINDING
sections.body:
The final ledger correlation isolates four distinct axes: the exclusive source of the basic lead carbonate within the workspace, the 487,000 francs logged under official initials, the terminal door-book registration at 19:05, and the fresh friction ridge impressions left upon the decanter stopper. The remaining witness statements served chiefly to draw attention toward the noisy arguments of the afternoon.

Marked reliable by the clerk who was himself twice found mistaken. It was observed at the desk that fear and deceit oft borrow one another's garments. Thus was it lodged in the file, though not one man at the desk would swear to the whole of it. The desk-note beneath it read only: "keep apart from the louder papers."

Pencilled upon the inward flap, as though it were but a warehouse remembrance: sixth bell, seventh stair, fifth lantern, eighth berth.
